name: Easy Chicken Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 small Unpitted red apple, coarsely chopped
1 can (10 3/4 ounces) condensed cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook margarine and curry powder in a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat for about 4 minutes, stirring frequently until the onion is tender.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients except rice and peanuts.
3. Cook, stirring occasionally, until hot.
4. Serve over rice and sprinkle with peanuts.
